completeness.notes: No public docs site — surface inferred from existing hand-written client + live probe of /v1/chains and /v1/tokens. POST endpoints (/v1/quotes, /v1/deposit/build, /v1/deposit/submit) have permissive request schemas: deposit/build accepts 4 variants (canonical/fromAddress/userAddress/legacy) and deposit/submit accepts 3 variants — modeled as `additionalProperties: true` since server dispatches by field presence and oneOf would be ambiguous. Response bodies for all POST/PUT endpoints are `additionalProperties: true` (complex EIP-712 payloads, route descriptors). Token + Chain shapes typed from real responses.
